channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: Tesla Earnings Beat, But TSLA Stock Falls On Elon Musk Comments; HW3.0 'Does Not Have The Capability'
item.description: Tesla earnings beat views late Wednesday. Tesla stock turned lower as CEO Elon Musk spoke on the earnings call.

item.title: Dow Jones Futures Fall After Nasdaq Hits High; Tesla Stock Sinks On Elon Musk Comments
item.description: The Nasdaq hit a new high as techs led Wednesday. Tesla fell late on Elon Musk comments. Lam Research, CSX, Texas Instruments and IBM were big earnings movers overnight.

item.title: Tesla Says It Will Need To Build Micro Factories To Retrofit Old Cars For FSD
item.description: Millions of Teslas sold between 2019 and 2023 will not be able to achieve unsupervised Full Self-Driving without the hardware upgrade.

item.title: Tesla reports higher profits, confirms hefty spending ahead
item.description: Tesla reported higher first-quarter profits Wednesday, topping expectations as it confirmed plans for massive additional investments in autonomous transport, humanoid robotics and artificial intelligence.Tesla plans to prepare its first factor to produce the humanoid robots in the second quarte.

item.title: Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500 and Nasdaq futures slide as US-Iran uncertainty persists, Tesla slips after-hours
item.description: US major gauges retreated from fresh records as tech earnings after-hours dragged markets down.

item.title: Tesla reports mixed financial results as Musk pivots automaker to AI and robots
item.description: Figures fail to significantly buoy stock as firm admits ‘significant effort and hard work’ needed to achieve goals

item.title: Elon Musk's Optimus dream inches closer to reality
item.description: Tesla's and CEO Elon Musk's Optimus robot dreams may soon be reality.

item.title: Tesla says mass production of electric Semi to begin this year
item.description: Tesla says its long-delayed Semi will begin production this year, signaling a slow but critical ramp into the freight market. The post Tesla says mass production of electric Semi to begin this year appeared first on FreightWaves.

item.title: Tesla will build factories just to retrofit millions of HW3 cars it said could do FSD
item.description: There are millions of Tesla vehicles on the road today which were sold on the promise of full autonomy, but without hardware capable of doing so. Tesla CEO Elon Musk just proposed the company could build “microfactories” in urban areas in order to upgrade the computers and cameras in those videos...

item.title: Tesla Q1: Why I'm Constructive On The Narrative But The Stock Is Still A Sell
Optimus 3: Musk teases plans for unveiling
item.description: Tesla (TSLA) reported first quarter results on Wednesday after the closing bell. Adjusted earnings per share (EPS) came in at $0.41 (compared to analyst estimates of $0.34), and revenue came in at $22.39 billion (compared to analyst estimates of $22.19 billion). On the earnings call, CEO Elon Mus...

item.title: Elon Musk admits millions of Tesla owners need upgrades for true ‘Full Self-Driving’
item.description: The admission could open Tesla to legal challenges after it spent years promising customers they were just one software update away from owning fully autonomous cars.

item.title: Tesla's Quarterly Call Ends. Here Are the Takeaways.
item.description: Tesla's first-quarter earnings conference call is a wrap. Shares sold off during the call and were down about 2% near $379 in after-hours trading. Higher-than-expected capital spending is likely weighing on investor sentiment.

item.title: Elon Musk pushes Tesla Roadster unveil again — now ‘maybe in a month or so’
item.description: Elon Musk has once again pushed back the Tesla Roadster unveiling. During yesterday’s Q1 2026 earnings call, the CEO said the car might debut “in a month or so” — blowing past the late April timeline he had set just weeks ago. It marks at least the eighth time Musk has moved the goalposts on the ...

item.title: Tesla isn’t joking about building Optimus at an industrial scale: Here we go
item.description: Tesla’s Q1 2026 Update Letter , released today, confirms that first generation Optimus production lines are now well underway at its Fremont, California factory, with a pilot line targeting one million robots per year to start. Of bigger note is a shared aerial image of a large piece of land adja...

item.title: Maybe Cybercab Is the Smaller Tesla People Have Been Anticipating
item.description: Musk doesn't see a future in human-driven cars. He sees Cybercab making up most of Tesla vehicle sales in the future. That means Cybercab, Tesla's purpose-built two-seat robo-taxi, might just be the smaller Tesla people have been waiting for.

item.title: Intel lands key first customer for '14A' chip tech with Tesla's Terafab project, Musk says
item.description: Tesla's Chief Executive Officer Elon Musk said on Wednesday the company plans to use Intel's advanced 14A ‌manufacturing process to make chips at its Terafab project. The ‌move marks a breakthrough for Intel, which has been trying to revamp its business ​to attract outside customers to use its ch...

item.title: Elon Musk pushes unsupervised FSD for consumer Teslas — again
item.description: During Tesla’s Q1 2026 earnings call today, CEO Elon Musk confirmed that unsupervised Full Self-Driving for consumer vehicles won’t arrive until Q4 2026 at the earliest — pushing the timeline yet again after years of broken promises. When asked directly when FSD unsupervised would reach customer ...

item.title: Tesla Stock Goes Red. Here's Why.
item.description: Tesla stock gave up after-hours gains and was down slightly as investors listened to Elon Musk answer questions. A few things could be weighing on investor sentiment. Higher capital spending is one.

item.title: Robo-Taxi Revenue to Be Significant in 2027.
item.description: Eventually, Tesla's robo-taxi operations need to yield billions in profits to justify Tesla's $1.7 trillion valuation, based on its fully diluted share count, which includes Musk's options. Musk said the robo-taxi rollout would remain slow, with safety the top priority.

item.title: Investors Have to Wait for Optimus, Version 3
item.description: It sounds like investors will have to wait until late summer to see the third generation of Optimus, with Musk preferring to hold the unveiling until the start of production. Optimus will initially be built in Fremont, California, where Tesla builds the Model S and X, among other products. The pa...

item.title: Tesla: Don't Fall For The Hype, It's A Sell
Musk, Ever the Optimist
item.description: Tesla's earnings conference call started about 5:30 p.m. Eastern time. Musk struck an optimistic tone early in the call, as expected, saying Tesla has a "very exciting year ahead of us," adding that capital spending would be higher, as expected.

item.title: Tesla investors really need to see progress on Robotaxi, robotics
item.description: Tesla (TSLA) reported first quarter results on Wednesday after the closing bell. Adjusted earnings per share (EPS) came in at $0.41 (compared to analyst estimates of $0.34), and revenue came in at $22.39 billion (compared to analyst estimates of $22.19 billion). Yahoo Finance Senior Autos Reporte...

item.title: Trading Tesla stock around earnings is a coin toss, but long-term investors have better odds
item.description: Tesla's post-earnings reaction can look like a trader's dream — or a trap.

item.title: Tesla: A Very Noisy Q1
Tesla seems to say Robotaxi launch will be pushed back in 5 US cities
item.description: Tesla has released quarterly earnings , and the announcement was accompanied by what seems to be a backpedaling on availability of Robotaxis in 5 of the 8 cities Tesla has announced availability in. more…

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) pulled questionable levers to make Q1 2026 financials look good
item.description: Tesla’s Q1 2026 earnings beat looks impressive on the surface — 21.1% gross margin, 136% operating income growth, $0.41 non-GAAP EPS. But dig into the shareholders’ letter and a pattern emerges: Tesla pulled every accounting and financial lever available to make a stagnant quarter look like a tur...

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) releases Q1 2026 financial results: slight beat on earnings
item.description: Tesla (TSLA) released its financial results and shareholders’ letter for the first quarter (Q1) 2026 after market close today. We are updating this post with all the details from the financial results, shareholders’ letter, and the conference call later tonight. Refresh for the latest information.

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) Q1 2026 earnings results: beat on EPS and revenues
item.description: Tesla ( NASDAQ: TSLA ) reported its earnings for the first quarter of 2026 on Wednesday afternoon. Here’s what the company reported compared to what Wall Street analysts expected. The earnings results come after Tesla reported a miss on vehicle deliveries for the first quarter , delivering 358,02...

item.title: SpaceX is following in Tesla’s footsteps in a way nobody expected
item.description: When Elon Musk founded Tesla in 2003, it was a plucky electric car startup betting everything on lithium-ion batteries and a niche luxury Roadster. Two decades later, Tesla is far more than a car company. Its valuation increasingly hinges on Full Self-Driving software, the Optimus humanoid robot,...

item.title: Tesla Earnings, Elon Musk Due With Stock Near Key Levels; What To Look For
item.description: Tesla earnings are expected to rise, but the focus will be on CEO Elon Musk and robotaxi news. Tesla stock is near key levels

item.title: BMW unveils the new i7 with nearly 450 miles of range and Neue Klasse style [Images]
item.description: BMW gave its flagship electric sedan an overhaul for the 2027 model year. The new BMW i7 offers nearly 450 miles of range, advanced new tech, and an updated Neue Klasse design. more…

item.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Gains, Nasdaq Heads Near Record On Trump Ceasefire; Palantir Jumps (Live Coverage)
item.description: Stock Market Today: The Dow Jones index rose Wednesday after Trump extended the U.S.-Iran ceasefire. Tesla earnings are due late.

item.title: Tesla Earnings: financial expectations and what we should to hear about
item.description: Tesla ( NASDAQ: TSLA ) will report its earnings for the first quarter of 2026 this evening after the market closes, and analysts have already put out their expectations from a financial standpoint for the company’s first three months of the year. Additionally, there will be plenty of things that ...

item.title: Americans would get ‘universal high income’ via steady federal checks under Elon Musk’s new proposal. Will it happen?
item.description: “Everyone can have a penthouse if they want.”

item.title: Tesla Sees 30% Profit Growth As AI Focus Drives Investor Debate
item.description: Projected earnings rebound may be overshadowed by scrutiny on robotics, AI progress, and stretched valuation

item.title: Tesla Has Made Robo-Taxi Progress
item.description: In January, Musk said Tesla robo-taxis could be in dozens of cities by the end of 2026. Tesla launched a robo-taxi service in Austin, Texas, in June, with safety monitors in the front passenger seat. Bulls believe robo-taxis will eventually be cheaper than owning cars, disrupting personal transpo...

item.title: What Wall Street Is Focused On
item.description: Wall Street bulls and bears don’t always agree on Tesla stock. “The single most important [guidance] item on this earnings call is whether management provides any credible update on the transition to driverless [robo-taxi] operations,” wrote GLJ Research analyst Gordon Johnson in a preview report.

item.title: Top Stocks That Are Powering the EV and AV Revolution
item.description: From charging infrastructure to self-driving tech to zero-emission vehicles, Beam Global, Innoviz and NIO offer distinct ways to play the EV and AV trends.

item.title: Elon Musk Says If You Plan In Retiring In 10-20 Years Don't Stress If You've Got Nothing Saved — 'It Won't Matter' Anyway
item.description: Retirement advice usually comes with a calculator and a warning. Elon Musk brought neither. The Tesla and SpaceX CEO is floating a future where the entire idea of grinding toward a nest egg might not even apply by the time...

item.title: Tesla Q1 earnings: Should investors be betting against Elon Musk?
item.description: Tesla (TSLA) is set to report first quarter earnings after Wednesday's closing bell. As Wall Street prepares to hear what CEO Elon Musk has to say on the earnings call, what aspects of the EV company will investors focus on as it leans heavier into robotics? Annandale Capital founder George Seay ...

item.title: Tesla Stock Is Up Ahead of Earnings
item.description: Tesla stock rose in early trading Wednesday, before the company reports first-quarter earnings after the market close. Shares were at $391.34, up 1.3%, while the S&P 500 was 0.6% higher. Early gains left shares down about 9% since Tesla reported fourth-quarter numbers on Jan.

item.title: Tesla Finally Has What Wall St. Wants–A New Model
item.description: One of the primary criticisms of Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) is that its models are old. The fact that their software is updated “over-the-air” isn’t good enough for some investors. It has killed the Model S and Model X.

item.title: Musk's $60 Billion Cursor Bet Comes With a $10 Billion Exit Cost
item.description: SpaceX secures the right to acquire coding startup Cursor

item.title: SpaceX Lines Up $60 Billion Deal for AI Start-Up. It’s Taking on OpenAI and Anthropic.
item.description: The rocket manufacturer is piling into the AI coding race, a battle that will pit it against the likes of OpenAI and Anthropic.

item.title: Ranking the "Magnificent Seven" From Most to Least Attractive, Based on Future Cash Flow
item.description: Among Nvidia, Alphabet, Apple, Microsoft, Amazon, Meta Platforms, and Tesla, there are two screaming bargains and one pricey company whose valuation can't be justified.

item.title: Stocks Rise Pre-Bell as Trump Extends Iran Ceasefire; Tesla Earnings On Deck
item.description: The main US stock measures were trending higher in Wednesday's premarket activity after President Do

item.title: If You Bought Tesla When Cathie Wood Did, Here’s What You Have Today
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) has been one of the most debated stocks of the past decade, and no one has been more publicly attached to that debate than Cathie Wood. ARK Invest began accumulating Tesla shares around 2014 through its flagship exchange-traded funds, and Wood became one of the stock’s most v...

item.title: These Stocks Are Today’s Movers: Tesla, United Airlines, Capital One, DJT, Adobe, and More
item.description: Tesla climbs 0.8% ahead of first-quarter earnings, while United Airlines shares shrug off a full-year guidance cut.
